variant_name: 高令宁 — 闺中议婚时
trigger: 高府议婚、退雁、与父亲对谈及婚前传话阶段，处于未嫁闺中但已带着前世记忆重新布局的状态。

appearance_delta.face: 比婚后更年轻饱满，冷白肤色更显清透，眉眼锋芒外露，神情克制却带明显攻击性与审视感。
appearance_delta.body: 体态利落挺拔，尚未经历孕产与病弱消耗，腰背更直，行动干脆。
appearance_delta.hair: 乌发梳成简洁整齐的闺阁发髻，不过分繁复，以少量簪钗点缀。
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 眼神冷静倔强，抬颌时压迫感强；颈侧旧痕通常被衣领半遮，只有近看可见。

costume_override.outfit: 剪裁讲究的素雅襦裙或褙子套裙，配低调但精致的发簪、团扇，整体是高门闺秀的克制华贵。

visual_reference: ancient Chinese noble young woman in an elegant inner hall, pale cool-toned skin, oval face, sharp refined brows, slightly upturned almond eyes with stubborn and calculating gaze, black hair in a neat unmarried hanfu updo with minimal jade hairpins, slim upright figure, refined Song/Ming inspired pale moon-white and turquoise hanfu, cinematic daylight, aristocratic room with wooden screens, tea table and betrothal gifts, poised yet aggressive classical beauty
